testcase.name: test_bulk_revoke_regular_admin_forbidden

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('Super Admin' in 'CSRF token missing' or 'super' in 'csrf token missing') + where 'CSRF token missing' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff11d3019a00>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff11d3019a00> = {'detail': 'CSRF token missing', 'error_code': 'CSRF_MISSING'}.get + and 'csrf token missing' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff11d2d0eec0>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff11d2d0eec0> = 'CSRF token missing'.lower + where 'CSRF token missing' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff11d3019a00>('detail', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff11d3019a00> = {'detail': 'CSRF token missing', 'error_code': 'CSRF_MISSING'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bulk_revoke.py:138: in test_bulk_revoke_regular_admin_forbidden assert "Super Admin" in data.get("detail", "") or "super" in data.get("detail", "").lower() E AssertionError: assert ('Super Admin' in 'CSRF token missing' or 'super' in 'csrf token missing') E + where 'CSRF token missing' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff11d3019a00>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff11d3019a00> = {'detail': 'CSRF token missing', 'error_code': 'CSRF_MISSING'}.get E + and 'csrf token missing' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff11d2d0eec0>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xff11d2d0eec0> = 'CSRF token missing'.lower E + where 'CSRF token missing' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff11d3019a00>('detail', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff11d3019a00> = {'detail': 'CSRF token missing', 'error_code': 'CSRF_MISSING'}.get

testcase.name: test_bulk_revoke_invalid_confirmation_text
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bulk_revoke.py:170: in test_bulk_revoke_invalid_confirmation_text assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 403: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_revoke_reason_too_short
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bulk_revoke.py:187: in test_bulk_revoke_reason_too_short assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 403: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_revoke_empty_reason
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bulk_revoke.py:204: in test_bulk_revoke_empty_reason assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 403: {"detail":"CSRF token missing","error_code":"CSRF_MISSING"} E assert 403 == 400 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_revoke_invalid_advocate
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_bulk_revoke.py:36: in super_admin_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Super admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Super admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please slow down.","retry_after":"5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_revoke_with_revoke_confirmation
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_bulk_revoke.py:36: in super_admin_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Super admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Super admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please slow down.","retry_after":"5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bulk_revoke_history_regular_admin_can_access
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_bulk_revoke.py:46: in regular_admin_token assert response.status_code == 200, f"Regular admin login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Regular admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please slow down.","retry_after":"5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
